name: Prompt Injection Detector
description: Scans agent input for prompt injection attacks. Detects instruction overrides, jailbreak attempts, role-play manipulations, system prompt leakage attempts, hidden instructions, encoding obfuscation, context manipulation, and privilege escalation. Returns confidence score with block/warn/pass recommendation. Pay-per-request via x402 (USDC on Base).

authentication.instructions: Send USDC on Base to the recipient address, then include the tx hash in the X-Payment-Tx header.

tools.name: scan_for_injection
tools.description: Scans text for prompt injection patterns including instruction overrides, jailbreak attempts, role-play manipulations, system prompt leakage attempts, hidden instructions, encoding obfuscation, context manipulation, and privilege escalation.

text.description: The agent input text to scan for prompt injection patterns

injectionDetected.description: Whether any injection patterns were found

confidence.description: Confidence score from 0 (no injection) to 1 (definite injection)

recommendation.description: Recommended action based on confidence level
